en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Developers in Barcelona Are Being Laid Off as Ubisoft Celebrates Game's Success
cn_title: 育碧庆《黑旗》大卖却裁巴塞罗那团队
subtitle: 成功背后的裁员
opus_summary: 育碧在《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》首日销量突破200万份之际，仍推进巴塞罗那团队裁员。参与水下关卡制作的员工将罢工抗议，称51个职位即将消失。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft Barcelona developers who contributed to Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced have spoken out about the company's plans to lay them off — just as their final project becomes a commercial success, selling 2 million copies in around 24 hours.
paragraphs.cn: 参与《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》开发的育碧巴塞罗那员工公开谈论了公司的裁员计划——就在他们参与的最后一个项目取得商业成功、约24小时售出200万份之际。

paragraphs.en: Layoffs at Ubisoft Barcelona were announced last month as part of a wider wave of job losses across the firm. 380 staff are being let go in this latest downsizing, spread across offices in Winnipeg and Belgrade (which will close completely), in Barcelona, and in the company's global publishing division.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧上月宣布裁减巴塞罗那团队，这是公司更大范围裁员潮的一部分。此次缩编将裁掉380名员工，涉及温尼伯、将彻底关闭的贝尔格莱德、巴塞罗那办公室，以及公司的全球发行部门。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft Barcelona has a history of supporting projects typically led by other, larger Ubisoft studios, such as games in the Rabbids series and Star Trek: Bridge Crew. For Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, the team worked on the game's diving side-missions — a secondary activity that a separate team also worked on in the original Black Flag.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧巴塞罗那长期为其他规模更大的育碧工作室主导的项目提供支持，例如《疯狂兔子》系列和《星际迷航：舰桥船员》。在《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》中，该团队负责潜水支线任务；原版《黑旗》的这项次要活动同样由一支独立团队制作。

paragraphs.en: "Ubisoft Barcelona did all the underwater levels," wrote Manel Cota, a tech and gameplay animator at the studio, via a post on social media. "And that same team is being fired right now because Ubisoft thinks that's what we deserve :)"
paragraphs.cn: 工作室技术与玩法动画师Manel Cota在社交媒体发文称：「育碧巴塞罗那制作了所有水下关卡。而现在，同一支团队正被解雇，因为育碧认为这就是我们应得的 :)」

paragraphs.en: Thanks! Ubisoft Barcelona did all the underwater levels. And that same team is being fired right now because Ubisoft thinks thats what we deserve :) https://t.co/rf3p4fGzlH
paragraphs.cn: 谢谢！育碧巴塞罗那制作了所有水下关卡。而现在，同一支团队正被解雇，因为育碧认为这就是我们应得的 :)https://t.co/rf3p4fGzlH

paragraphs.en: "Today is a bittersweet day," added Isabel Codina García, a quality assurance lead at Ubisoft Barcelona, via a post on LinkedIn that noted that a portion of the Barcelona studio had been working on the game for over two years. "However, two weeks before launch, the whole AC team at Ubisoft Barcelona was informed of a collective redundancy plan."
paragraphs.cn: 育碧巴塞罗那质量保证主管Isabel Codina García在LinkedIn发文补充道：「今天是苦乐参半的一天。」她指出，巴塞罗那工作室部分员工已为这款游戏工作超过两年。「然而，就在发售前两周，育碧巴塞罗那整个《刺客信条》团队都收到了集体裁员计划的通知。」

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, workers announced a strike against the layoffs will take place today, Tuesday July 14, and continue over the next couple of days. A flyer advertising the walkout claims that "51 staff will lose their jobs in the coming weeks."
paragraphs.cn: 员工昨日宣布，将于今天7月14日星期二发起反对裁员的罢工，并在随后几天继续行动。宣传罢工的传单称：「未来几周将有51名员工失去工作。」

paragraphs.en: "After years of dedication to our team, the company has turned its back on us," the flyer states. "We will never see the fruits of our labor, and the reward for our hard work will be the loss of our jobs."
paragraphs.cn: 传单写道：「在我们多年为团队奉献之后，公司却背弃了我们。我们永远看不到劳动成果，而辛勤工作的回报将是失去工作。」

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft plans for its Barcelona team to now focus solely on the Rainbow Six franchise, IGN understands, as part of wider organizational changes that have seen repeated reshufflings and redunancies across the whole company.
paragraphs.cn: IGN了解到，育碧计划让巴塞罗那团队今后只专注于《彩虹六号》系列。这是更广泛组织调整的一部分，整个公司已反复经历重组与裁员。

paragraphs.en: In March, Ubisoft confirmed that 105 staff were set to depart veteran Tom Clancy game studio Red Storm Entertainment , as part of a move that downsized the studio permanently, following three previous waves of layoffs at the company since 2022.
paragraphs.cn: 今年3月，育碧确认老牌汤姆·克兰西游戏工作室Red Storm Entertainment将有105名员工离职，此举导致该工作室永久性缩编。此前自2022年以来，育碧已进行过三轮裁员。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has cut hundreds of staff and fully closed numerous studios in recent times, with 2026 already off to a brutal start. In January, the company canceled six games including its Prince of Persia: Sands of Time remake and closed two Ubisoft studios completely (Ubisoft Stockholm and Ubisoft Halifax), while making layoffs at its office in Abu Dhabi, at Trials studio RedLynx and at Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora outfit Massive Entertainment.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧近期已裁减数百名员工并彻底关闭多家工作室，2026年开局便十分惨烈。今年1月，公司取消了包括《波斯王子：时之砂》重制版在内的六款游戏，并完全关闭了育碧斯德哥尔摩和育碧哈利法克斯两间工作室，同时在其阿布扎比办公室、《特技摩托》开发商RedLynx以及《阿凡达：潘多拉边境》开发商Massive Entertainment进行了裁员。

paragraphs.en: Just a week after that, Ubisoft announced plans to ditch 200 jobs at its company headquarters in Paris , leading to protests within the French capital. Next, in February, Ubisoft was forced to reassure fans that its long-awaited Splinter Cell remake remained in development after 40 jobs were eliminated at its studio Ubisoft Toronto .
paragraphs.cn: 仅一周后，育碧宣布计划在巴黎总部裁减200个职位，引发法国首都的抗议活动。接着在2月，育碧多伦多工作室裁减40个职位后，公司被迫向粉丝保证，备受期待的《细胞分裂》重制版仍在开发中。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
